political.s: Founder and owner John Menard Jr. is a Republican megadonor who has donated extensively to Republican candidates and PACs, including $50,000 to Trump's 2016 presidential campaign. Individual employee/owner donations totaled $52,518 in 2024; the company itself reported no lobbying activity.

charity.s: Menards operates through the Menard Family Foundation and a Scrip fundraising program offering nonprofits 4% discounts on gift cards. However, the company does not maintain a traditional corporate donation program with publicly disclosed giving amounts or focus areas.
charity.focus: Education, arts, health, animal conservation (Menard Family Foundation); local community initiatives via Scrip program

environment.s: Menards received the 2016 Wisconsin Business Friend of the Environment Award for wood recycling efforts (114 million pounds of waste) and has implemented sustainability upgrades. However, founder John Menard holds records for Wisconsin's highest environmental penalties, including $2 million (2005) and $1.7 million (1997) fines for hazardous waste violations.

labor.s: Multiple NLRB violations documented including anti-union wage penalties, mandatory arbitration clauses, and wage law violations involving unpaid breaks and overtime. 2024 Minnesota Department of Labor found Menards deducted wages 103 times for employee breast milk pumping and suspended the employee. Workplace safety incidents resulted in OSHA fines. Average manager pay 22% below national average.

dei.s: Menards reports a DEI program and has a Glassdoor diversity rating of 3.5/5 (sector average). Comparably diversity score is 68/100 in the top 40% for large companies. Limited public information on specific DEI initiatives or commitments.

guns.s: Menards does not sell firearms or ammunition but does sell gun safes and permits legal firearm carry in stores per state law. Corporate policy allows customers to carry firearms in compliance with applicable laws.

privacy.s: Menards collects customer location data, WiFi usage, and behavioral tracking through mobile apps and in-store systems. Privacy policy includes standard opt-out mechanisms but shares data with third-party analytics and business partners for targeted advertising.

execPay.s: Founder John Menard Jr. earns substantial compensation tied to company performance (historically $20+ million annually in high-revenue years). Average executive compensation $234,514; average employee salary $30,000-$32,000, creating significant disparity. Limited transparency on current CEO pay ratio.

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy
